あら、お兄様。わたくしの部屋に、何か御用ですの？<br>御安心を。もう部屋の中で:
Oh, Elder Brother. Do you have business in my room? Rest assured, I
no longer make ice statues indoors.
え？ 部屋が、片付いている……ですって？<br>ふふん、当たり前ですわ。わたくし:
What? You say the room is tidy? Hmph, of course it is. Who do you
think I am?
淑女の嗜みとして、掃除、洗濯、料理、いろいろと覚えましたの。<br>わたくし、や:
As a proper lady, I have learned many things: cleaning, laundry,
cooking. I can do anything on my own if I set my mind to it.
ここにあった家族の氷像？ あぁ、もうアレは不要ですわ。<br>いつまでも過去に囚:
My family's ice statues that were here? Ah, I no longer need them.
Dwelling on the past forever is third-rate for an artist.
今は、新しい作品を創造することに夢中ですの。<br>芸術に疎いお兄様の心にも響く:
Right now, I am engrossed in creating new works. A masterpiece that
will touch even your heart, so unfamiliar with art, Elder Brother—
